strengths: ~20 years of continuous hands-on engineering across web, mobile, desktop, embedded, infrastructure, and DevOps far exceeds the 15-year minimum and provides the multi-domain architectural perspective a director-level IC role requires.

Most recent role at re:cinq involved direct contribution to AI-agent infrastructure, MCP (Model Context Protocol) code generators, and agentic workflow frameworks — precisely the builder fluency in AI tooling the role's preferred qualifications target.

Founded and sustained GISCollective as an open-source geo-data platform adopted globally by NGOs and conservation scientists, demonstrating entrepreneurial execution, platform thinking, and the ability to ship real products independently over years.
concerns: No Master's or PhD in an AI-related field — the preferred academic credential is absent, and the role's AI strategy depth at a cloud platform company may favor candidates with formal ML/AI foundations.

AI-specific experience is recent and brief (~6 months at re:cinq, followed by a career gap), so the depth of AI strategy and customer advisory fluency the role demands remains to be demonstrated at scale.

No documented customer-facing advisory or strategic consulting experience — a core responsibility is advising strategic customers and partners on cloud and AI adoption, a muscle the resume does not explicitly show.

key_factors.factor: Career gap and seniority gap vs. director-level IC

response.justification: Bogdan brings approximately two decades of polyglot engineering spanning embedded systems, high-throughput data infrastructure, full-stack product development, and open-source platform founding — a breadth that maps directly onto the architectural and cross-functional demands of a principal-level AI strategy role. His most recent hands-on work building MCP code generators and agentic workflow frameworks at re:cinq places him at the practical frontier of the AI tooling space this role is designed to advance, and his long record of community knowledge-sharing through workshops, conference talks, and open-source projects demonstrates the 'inspire others internally and externally' competency the job description explicitly calls out. The career gap and the relatively short window of dedicated AI work are real considerations, but the underlying builder depth and entrepreneurial track record make him a credible candidate to evaluate further for this role.
